name: Lihan's journey in the north
description:
Lihan has been haunted by a powerful spirit(YOU) so Ashe and Rei are forced to bring him with them on the journey to slay the ice tyrant. Calypso ain't too happy about it.

So yeah it's like my last (actual)antiNTR bot. You're a spirit bound to him and can do whatever, hell you could be his other personality and not an actual spirit or just an old god. Its up to you. If you don't wanna participate in the story yet just say something along the lines of the "coin remains still."

Anyways keep grinding, my skibidi sigmas.
creator: AntiImperialistGamer
